dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal requires detection of: (1) established trend—proxied by ADX > 25; (2) gap in trend direction—not directly observable from OHLC data alone, requires external bar comparison; (3) retracement to significant level—approximated using pivot points and moving average (sma_20); (4) trend resumption—entry triggered when price crosses back through pivot/MA in trend direction. Exit uses simple MA crossover as proxy for trend reversal per AUTHOR_SILENT instruction. Entry tactics reference cannot be operationalized without additional context. Context-dependent direction requires separate LONG/SHORT condition branches for bidirectional trend trading.

source_rule_text: In a trending market with a gap in the trend direction, wait for a retracement to a significant support/resistance level, then enter when the trend resumes using established entry tactics.
